package rulecoverage

func PositiveOsGetenvInHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "os_getenv_in_hot_path"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`os.Getenv(\"KEY\")` inside handler functions or loops"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
